request.unsupportedMediaType: This media type is not supported.
request.rejected: The request could not be completed.

resource.notFound: The requested resource was not found.

auth.forbidden: You are not allowed to access this resource.
auth.refreshTokenInvalid: The refresh token is invalid or expired.
auth.logoutFailed: The logout request could not be completed.
auth.guildsUnavailable: The server list could not be retrieved.
auth.oauthFailed: Authentication could not be completed. Please try again.

rateLimit.exceeded: Too many requests. Please try again later.

guild.forbidden: You do not have access to this server.

leaderboard.aliasConflict: The leaderboard alias is already in use.
leaderboard.invalidSeason: The requested season is not available on this leaderboard.

botManagement.invalidRange: The bot management range is invalid.

permissions.nullRole: Roles must not contain null entries.
permissions.duplicateRole: Duplicate role IDs are not allowed.
permissions.roleNotInGuild: The role does not belong to this server.
permissions.modulesRequired: Module IDs are required for the role.
permissions.duplicateModule: Duplicate module IDs are not allowed for the role.
permissions.revisionConflict: Role permissions changed since they were loaded. Reload and try again.

settings.groupsRequired: All XP setting groups are required.
settings.collectionsRequired: All XP rule collections are required.
settings.messageCooldown: Message cooldown must not be negative.
settings.voicePoints: Voice XP values must not be negative.
settings.eventInterest: Event interest XP must not be negative.
settings.channelMultipliers: Channel multipliers require unique channels and non-negative values.
settings.levelRoles: Level roles require unique roles and positive levels.
settings.serverBoosterRequired: Server booster settings and tiers are required.
settings.serverBoosterTierCount: At most 10 server booster tiers are allowed.
settings.serverBoosterMonths: Boost months must be a non-negative whole number.
settings.serverBoosterMultiplier: Booster multipliers must be between 1.00 and 10.00 with at most two decimal places.
settings.serverBoosterDuplicateMonths: Server booster month thresholds must be unique.
settings.serverBoosterOrder: Server booster multipliers must not decrease as boost duration increases.

import.guildMismatch: The MEE6 export belongs to another server.
import.invalidPlayers: The MEE6 players export is invalid.

xpAudit.memberNotFound: The XP member was not found.
xpAudit.invalidCursor: The XP audit cursor is invalid.
xpAudit.invalidFilter: The XP audit filter is invalid.

xpAdjustment.selfAdjustmentForbidden: Non-owners cannot adjust their own XP.
xpAdjustment.amountOutOfRange: The adjustment amount is out of range.
xpAdjustment.requestConflict: The request ID was already used with different content.
xpAdjustment.entryNotFound: The XP adjustment was not found.
xpAdjustment.notManual: Only manual adjustments can be reversed.
xpAdjustment.alreadyReversed: The adjustment has already been reversed.

season.invalidTimeZone: The season time zone is invalid.
season.invalidSchedule: The season schedule or naming template is invalid.
season.invalidTransition: The requested season status transition is not allowed.
season.activeConflict: Another season is already active for this server.
season.planConflict: The requested seasons overlap with the existing plan.
season.notResumable: This season can only be resumed during its original time range.

levelAnnouncements.revisionConflict: Level-up messages changed since they were loaded.

customBotIdentity.disabled: Custom Bot Identity is disabled on this Rankoon instance.
customBotIdentity.guildNotAllowed: This server is not allowed to use Custom Bot Identity.
customBotIdentity.capacityReached: Custom Bot Identity is currently at capacity.
customBotIdentity.tokenInvalid: The bot token is invalid or revoked.
customBotIdentity.tokenAlreadyAssigned: This bot token is already assigned to another server.
customBotIdentity.tokenApplicationMismatch: Active identity token must belong to the same Discord application.
customBotIdentity.botNotInstalled: The custom bot is not installed in this server.
customBotIdentity.missingIntents: Enable Server Members Intent and Message Content Intent in Discord Developer Portal.
customBotIdentity.missingPermissions: Grant required permissions and move bot role above managed Rankoon roles.
customBotIdentity.roleHierarchyInvalid: Move custom bot role above all Rankoon-managed roles.
customBotIdentity.runtimeStartFailed: The custom bot runtime could not be started.
customBotIdentity.commandRegistrationFailed: Rankoon commands could not be registered.
customBotIdentity.selfRoleMigrationFailed: Self-role panels could not be migrated safely.
customBotIdentity.revisionConflict: The bot identity changed since it was loaded. Reload and try again.
customBotIdentity.ownerRequired: Only the server owner can manage Custom Bot Identity.
customBotIdentity.platformBotDepartureFailed: The custom bot is active, but the official Rankoon bot could not leave the server yet.
customBotIdentity.platformBotNotInstalled: Install the official Rankoon bot before returning to the platform identity.
customBotIdentity.authoritativeRuntimeUnavailable: The authoritative bot runtime is currently unavailable.
customBotIdentity.handoverIncomplete: The custom bot handover has not been completed yet.
customBotIdentity.returnToPlatformRequired: Return to the official Rankoon bot before completing this operation.

selfRoles.tooManyMappings: A self-role panel supports at most 20 mappings.
selfRoles.duplicateEmoji: Each self-role mapping must use a unique emoji.
selfRoles.roleNotManageable: The selected role cannot be managed by the bot.
selfRoles.channelNotUsable: The selected channel cannot receive self-role messages.
selfRoles.discordPermissions: The bot is missing permissions in this channel. Grant View Channel, Send Messages, Embed Links, Add Reactions, Read Message History, and Manage Messages.
selfRoles.emojiInvalid: A self-role mapping contains an invalid emoji.
selfRoles.emojiRejected: Discord rejected the emoji {{emoji}}. Choose another emoji or verify that it is available on this server.
selfRoles.revisionConflict: The self-role panel changed since it was loaded. Reload and try again.
selfRoles.tooManyEmbeds: A self-role panel supports at most 10 embeds.
selfRoles.missingRoleMappingsEmbed: Exactly one role-mappings embed is required.
selfRoles.tooManyFields: An embed supports at most 25 fields.
selfRoles.embedTitleTooLong: An embed title must not exceed 256 characters.
selfRoles.embedDescriptionTooLong: An embed description must not exceed 4096 characters.
selfRoles.fieldNameRequired: An embed field name is required.
selfRoles.fieldValueRequired: An embed field value is required.
selfRoles.fieldNameTooLong: An embed field name must not exceed 256 characters.
selfRoles.fieldValueTooLong: An embed field value must not exceed 1024 characters.
selfRoles.embedTextTooLong: Embed text must not exceed 6000 characters per message.
